name: Card
description: Card container with five visual variants (Elevated/Filled/Outlined/Tonal/Text), selectable state, link mode (Href), compact horizontal layout, and sub-component anatomy (Header/Content/Footer/Actions/Media).

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Child content rendered inside the card. Compose with FlareCardMedia/FlareCardHeader/FlareCardContent/FlareCardFooter/FlareCardActions.

parameters.name: Compact
parameters.description: When true, lays the card out horizontally (media on leading side, content beside it).

parameters.name: Elevation
parameters.description: Explicit elevation 0-5. null = variant default (Elevated=1, others flat).

parameters.name: Href
parameters.description: When set, the card renders as a link <a> to this URL.

parameters.name: Target
parameters.description: Target for link card (e.g. '_blank'). Only with Href.

parameters.name: Selectable
parameters.description: When true, card can be toggled selected (role=checkbox). Shows accent ring.

parameters.name: Selected
parameters.description: Whether a selectable card is selected. Supports @bind-Selected.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Overall size - controls corner radius and inner gap.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual variant: Elevated (default), Filled, Outlined, Tonal, Text. Mirrors ButtonVariant.

events.name: OnClick
events.description: Click handler. When set or Href set, card becomes interactive.

events.name: OnSelectionChange
events.description: Fired with new selected state when user toggles selectable card.
